target_user: Enterprise financial controllers, audit firms, tax compliance officers seeking AI assistance for Q1 review and tax season. High willingness to pay for compliance.
monetization: Per-user license, per-document processed, enterprise annual subscription.
reason: Q1 fiscal close and US tax deadline (April 15th) drives critical demand for AI-assisted financial data verification and explanation generation under strict compliance.
